title: GOAT Socials / GoSo
summary: Creative direction and production for regional brands—modern, cinematic, and internet-aware.
body: Co-founded a creative agency helping regional brands read as modern, cinematic, and internet-aware. Led social strategy, visual direction, shoot planning, editing, and day-to-day content execution.
Directed shoots, ran camera, and built repeatable content systems that keep strategy and personality in balance.

highlights.label: Sugaree
highlights.text: Culturally rooted social campaigns: app awareness and sustained audience engagement.

highlights.label: Hushrokha Physio
highlights.text: Trust-led healthcare content with a clean visual identity and bilingual delivery.

highlights.label: Fresh Cuts Assam
highlights.text: Community-first visuals emphasizing freshness, farming, and local identity.

title: Tea Pod / Tea Pot Talks
summary: A regional podcast identity built on culture, conversation, and modern Assamese storytelling.
body: Directed podcast visuals, story flow, editing, and overall creative production.
Planned shoots, framing, pacing, and episode structure—shaping how the show looks and moves around culture, conversation, and modern Assamese storytelling.

title: Impact Career Tutorials
summary: Fifty-plus short-form pieces, end to end, for an education-focused channel.
body: Produced and edited 50+ short-form pieces from concept through shoot and final edit.
Handled graphic design alongside video work in a high-volume educational content setting.

title: Growthbees Marketing Agency
summary: Campaign and brand edits for agency clients, from rough cut to delivery.
body: Edited video content across campaigns, brand content, and client deliverables for a marketing agency.

title: Freelance Drone Operator
summary: Broadcast and tourism aerials across Northeast India.
body: Worked as a freelance drone pilot across tourism, broadcast, and regional media.
Clients included Doordarshan, Megh Tourism, Dima Hasao Tourism, and others—delivering aerial footage for broadcast and promotional use across Northeast India.

title: Independent — YouTube
summary: Self-produced YouTube work: writing, shooting, editing, and publishing on a steady, independent cadence.
body: Built an early practice in self-produced video—every stage owned end to end.
Developed core skills in storytelling, camera, and editing through consistent, self-directed output.

title: Short Films — IFP Contest
summary: Three IFP contest entries across 2019, 2021, and 2023—each conceived, directed, and shot independently.
body: Three entries in the IFP short film contest across three consecutive cycles.
Each film was independently conceived, directed, and shot.

title: Paplu
summary: Graduation documentary with full direction and cinematography from prep through final cut.
body: Graduation documentary with full directorial and cinematography responsibility from pre-production through final cut.

title: Youthzkorner Productions
summary: Long-running collaboration across cinematography and creative direction.
body: Ongoing partnership spanning cinematography and creative direction across multiple projects.

title: International Physiotherapy Conclave 2026
summary: Official logo for the International Physiotherapy Conclave 2026.
body: Designed the official logo for the International Physiotherapy Conclave 2026.

title: Vinyl Sessions × NEUM
summary: Curated pop-up: visual identity and hands-on event production.
body: Designed and produced a curated pop-up music event—visual identity, logistics, and on-site execution.

title: Origii Apparels
summary: Pop-up spatial design and management for a local clothing startup.
body: Pop-up event design and management for a local clothing startup—brand presence and spatial layout.
